2606.29399.title: LLM-Guided Planning for Multi-hop Reasoning over Multimodal Nuclear Regulatory Documents
2606.29399.paper_summary: Reviewing nuclear regulatory documents requires multi-hop reasoning across tens of thousands of pages, where judgments depend on evidence assembled across multiple chapters. We frame this task as planning: an LLM-based agent observes the evidence collected so far, picks the next document fragment to inspect, and stops when the evidence is sufficient. The agent operates over a vectorless document tree using browse, read, and search tools, and maintains a dynamic knowledge graph (KG) as state. On a 200-question benchmark over NuScale Final Safety Analysis Report (FSAR) documents, the system reaches 81.5% accuracy with a RAGAS Faithfulness of 0.93. The dominant performance factor is planning: against PageIndex, which uses the same document tree without state-conditioned action selection, the gap is +38.0pp (43.5% to 81.5%, p<0.001). The system also outperforms LightRAG (73.0%, p<0.05), HippoRAG (70.5%, p<0.01), and GraphRAG (49.5%, p<0.001), and matches RAPTOR (75.5%, p=0.11) without offline indexing. Edge inference adds 2.8x cost without raising accuracy; we retain it as a traceability module. Of 7,391 inferred edges, 3 Violates edges (0.04%) flag scope boundaries (Q058) and partial conformance (Q176) as typed annotations that a human reviewer can audit.
2606.29399.paper_summary_zh: 審查核能監管文件需要在數萬頁中進行多步推理，判斷依賴於跨多個章節收集的證據。 我們將這項任務框架化為規劃：一個基於LLM的代理觀察到迄今為止收集的證據，選擇下一個要檢查的文件片段，並在證據足夠時停止。 該代理在無向量的文件樹上運作，使用瀏覽、閱讀和搜索工具，並維護一個動態知識圖譜（KG）作為狀態。 在針對NuScale最終安全分析報告（FSAR）文件的200個問題基準上，該系統達到了81.5%的準確率，RAGAS的忠實度為0.93。 主導性能因素是規劃：與使用相同文件樹但沒有狀態條件動作選擇的PageIndex相比，差距為+38.0pp（從43.5%到81.5%，p<0.001）。 該系統還超越了LightRAG（73.0%，p<0.05）、HippoRAG（70.5%，p<0.01）和GraphRAG（49.5%，p<0.001），並在沒有離線索引的情況下達到RAPTOR（75.5%，p=0.11）。 邊緣推理增加了2.8倍的成本，但並未提高準確性；我們將其保留作為可追溯性模塊。在7391個推斷邊緣中，3個違規邊緣（0.04%）標記範圍邊界（Q058）和部分符合性（Q176）作為人類審核者可以審計的類型註釋。
2606.29399.author: Mingyu Jeon et.al.
2606.29399.authors: Mingyu Jeon, Bokyeong Kim, Suwan Cho, Jae Young Suh, Yonggyun Yu
